question_text: Name two ways you can increase the pressure of a gas trapped in a sealed container.
correct_answer: Any two of: (1) Decrease the volume by compressing the gas; (2) Increase the temperature of the gas; (3) Add more gas particles to the container.
explanation: Pressure increases when particles collide more frequently or with greater force. This happens when volume shrinks, temperature rises, or more particles are added—all causing more collisions with the container walls.
